properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am blessed now cause I received your love I am cured now cause you healed the wounds inside All the fear all the tears you've put them all aside You've lend a hand when I broke my feet and led me to the light

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My Lord, my God my savior I thank Jesus I'm alive You showed me the way to find the brighter side My lord, my God, My Savior I thank Jesus I'm revived You died on the cross for us to have a better life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We, We are sinners but still he died for us We, have salvation by his blood when he died The sin of soul he bought it all and saved us from the fire We are redeemed by your blood, the blood of Holy God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All the fears all the tears you've put them all aside You've lend a hand when I broke my feet and led me to the light
